type_pay_money.text: ประเภทการจ่าย

root.sql:
SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as membername , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.crem_amount, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type, sc_lon_m_loan_request.fee_amount as fee_amount
,( select nvl(sum(fund_new),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_new where sc_lon_m_req_fund_new.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) as fund_new
, FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) as loan_type , FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type )) as loan_type_description ,
sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , to_tdate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'dd month')||' '||'พ.ศ.'||to_tdate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'yyyy') as thia_begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer , sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status,
sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no ,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id ,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id
,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.sort_order ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name
,( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as principal_amount
,( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as interest_amount
,sc_lon_m_rule.account_id , ( select sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name from sc_acc_m_account_master where sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_lon_m_rule.account_id ) as account_name ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_code ,(select deposit_name from sc_dep_m_rule where deposit_type_code = pka_dep.fp_get_deptype(sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no))as bank_name ,pka_dep.fp_get_deptype(sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no)as dep_type FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,si_security_user ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid -- ,sc_acc_m_ucf_bank WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and si_security_user.user_id = sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer -- and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_code = sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_id and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money in ( 'TRD' ) --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = '19/01/2022' and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no --and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no =1
/*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no

r_amnat_loan_paid_cash_not_by_fin_nest.sql:
SELECT tab_data.account_id, tab_data.account_name,
tab_data.principal_amount, tab_data.interest_amount, tab_data.item_amount, tab_data.loan_type from ( /* เงินกู้ */ SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id as money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id as branch_id FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money in ( 'TRD' ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type union
SELECT sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id as account_id , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name as account_name , '' as loan_type, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id as money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id as branch_id FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item in ( 'LFE','ISL','OTH','SHR' ) and --( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item <> 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money in ( 'TRD' ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id
) tab_data , sc_fin_m_close_day ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_com_m_branch where sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = tab_data.receipt_date and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = tab_data.money_type_id and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = {0} --and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = {1} --and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id in ( 'TRD' ) and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_fin_m_close_day.branch_fin and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = tab_data.branch_id group by sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id , tab_data.account_id, tab_data.account_name,
tab_data.principal_amount, tab_data.interest_amount, tab_data.item_amount, tab_data.loan_type order by sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date ,tab_data.account_id

r_amnat_loan_paid_cash_not_by_fin_nest_l.sql:
SELECT tab_data.account_id, tab_data.account_name,
tab_data.principal_amount, tab_data.interest_amount, tab_data.item_amount, tab_data.loan_type from ( /* เงินกู้ */ SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id as money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id as branch_id FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money in ( 'TRD' ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = {2} /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type union
SELECT sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id as account_id , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name as account_name , '' as loan_type, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id as money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id as branch_id FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item in ( 'LFE','ISL','OTH','SHR' ) and --( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item <> 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money in ( 'TRD' ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = {2} /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id
) tab_data , sc_fin_m_close_day ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_com_m_branch where sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = tab_data.receipt_date and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = tab_data.money_type_id and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = {0} --and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = {1} --and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id in ( 'TRD' ) and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_fin_m_close_day.branch_fin and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = tab_data.branch_id group by sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id , tab_data.account_id, tab_data.account_name,
tab_data.principal_amount, tab_data.interest_amount, tab_data.item_amount, tab_data.loan_type order by sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date ,tab_data.account_id

SELECT sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount , sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount, decode( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item , 'LON' , sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name ) as loan_type_des, sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.sort_order FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id in( 'CLR' , 'TRL' ) ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) )

r_amnat_loan_paid_cash_not_by_fin_nest_p.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no, (case money_type_id when 'TRB' then pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no , '###-#-#####-#######' ) when 'TRD' then pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no , '##-##########' ) else trim( money_type_name ) end ) as money_type , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_code, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.paid_amount FROM sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type WHERE sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = {0}

r_amnat_loan_paid_cash_not_by_fin_nest_f.sql:
select sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no as loan_requestment_no, sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_name as fee_name, sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount as amount from sc_lon_m_req_fee, sc_lon_m_loan_request, sc_lon_m_ucf_fee where sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type = sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = {0}
union
SELECT sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no as loan_requestment_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.description as fee_name, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount as amount FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type
WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = {1} ) AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'SL' and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) )

r_amnat_loan_paid_cash_not_by_fin_nest_p.sql: SELECT sum(sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.paid_amount) as paid_amount ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_code ,sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_name FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,si_security_user ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid ,sc_acc_m_ucf_bank WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and si_security_user.user_id = sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_code = sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_id(+) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money in ( 'TRD' ) -- and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = '24/04/2024' and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no -- and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = {0} GROUP BY sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_code ,sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_name order by sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id

SELECT sum(sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.paid_amount) as paid_amount ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_code ,sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_name FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,si_security_user ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid ,sc_acc_m_ucf_bank WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money and si_security_user.user_id = sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_code = sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_id(+) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money in ( 'TRD' ) -- and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = '24/04/2024' and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no -- and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = {0} and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = {1} GROUP BY sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_code ,sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_name order by sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id
